intents.text: Asking whether packages can be searched by keywords alone.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: so we can't search just by keywords?

intents.text: Add a unique searchable keyword 'pi-package' to the packages.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: ensure that we have a unique keyword we can search for, how about pi-package?

intents.text: Add the keyword to ../pi-doom/, ../pi-package-test/, and ../pi-gitlab-duo/ instead.
Publish new versions of those three packages.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: then publish new versions of these

intents.text: Document the 'pi-package' keyword in extensions.md, README.md, and any other relevant .md files.
Commit and push the changes in the working directory.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: commit an dpush the changes in the working dir
